titleStmt.title: SII 39.126: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 126. (A.R. No. 126 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA •••••••••• ŚAKA 1364 (1442 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records that Aḻagiyamaṇavāḻapperumāḷ-Toṇḍai[māṉār] the chief of Arantāṅgi in Iḷaṅgōnāḍu, a sub-division of Sundarapāṇḍyavaḷanāḍu ordered that certain lands in Nāṭṭumāṅgalam belonged to Mēṉṉiṉṟaperumāḷ Ātiśu[ra]rāma Toṇḍaimāṉār, to be made as tax-free to the temple. The signatory is mentioned as Nirambavaḻagiyāṉ Kāliṅgarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
satyam cakāttam 1000 3 100 6 10 4 mel cellā niṉṟa tuntupi varuṣam puraṭṭāti mātam
ṟāṉa cuntirapāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu Iḷaṅkonāṭṭu Aṟantāṅkiyaracu Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa perumāḷ toṇṭai
nayiṉār meṉṉiṉṟa perumāḷ Aticūrarāmat toṇṭaimāṉāṟku nāṭṭumaṅkalam Ācākuṭi vayalil A
mañcakarai vayalil Oruvarum Ovvātāṉkāṇi Ūrār pakkal koṇṭa rūpāy kurunta vayakka cāttiyapaṭi vaya
kkalum peṟṟā vayakkalum vayirāṇṭi vayalil tevatāṉa nikki niṉṟa nilam nāṉkellai kkuṭpaṭṭa
nilattu rūpāy Āka yiṉ nilattukku kaṭamai maṇveṭṭi muṭṭi Uḷḷatu kaḻittu kuṭutta Aḷavukku yimmariyā
ti canṟātittavarai Āḷakkaṭavārākavum Itukku Akitam paṇṇukiṟavarkaḷ gaṅkaikkaraiyil brāhmaṇarai
yum kapilaiyuṅ koṉṟa pāvattai peṟak kaṭavārākavum yippaṭikku Uṭaiyavar Aruḷic ceyalpaṭṭikku
nirampavaḻakiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
